title: Hall of Confluence
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Hall of Confluence''' was a room in the [[Shimrra's Citadel|Citadel]], where [[Shimrra Jamaane]], the [[Supreme Overlord]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], held court with the [[Elite (Yuuzhan Vong)|Elite]]. The Hall was a trompe l'oeil, vanishing at the [[hau polyp]] throne built for the Supreme Overlord. The walls were built of [[chitin marble]], with four entrances for each of the [[Yuuzhan Vong castes|Ruling Castes]]. It was supported by pillars made of the bones of some large beast, with laces of [[yorik coral]] across the arches of the roof. Special [[dovin basal]]s gave the room a peculiar sense of [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]]: as one got closer to Shimrra's throne, it would feel as though they were walking "up hill", as though approaching the Supreme Overlord was in of itself a great task. Special seats and pews were made for the [[Great Council (Yuuzhan Vong)|Great Council]] that compensated for the gravity.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
